---
name: Missed PII (false negative)
about: The anonymizer failed to mask something it should have
labels: false-negative
---

> **Never paste real personal data.** Reproduce the miss with synthetic data
> (e.g. Faker, or a made-up name/number with the same shape).

**Input (synthetic)**
```
```

**Language**: ja / en

**Entity type that was missed**: PERSON / PHONE_NUMBER / ...

**Actual output**
```
```

**Target**: Python library / CLI / browser app / Chrome extension / desktop app
